title: zanthoxylum riedelianum subsp. kellermanii
intro: Zanthoxylum riedelianum subsp. kellermanii is a species of plant in the genus Zanthoxylum, commonly known as the yellow pepper tree or yellow prickly ash. This plant is native to the tropical regions of South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum riedelianum subsp. kellermanii include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to protect against infections and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves, bark, or roots, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or capsules, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal applications.
